name: Sidecar Search
description: Cmd-K + Cmd-P replacement popup with native-palette parity: fuzzy-ranked search over collections (incl. hidden), views, pages; inline New/Open/Settings/Create rows; per-collection sub-palette; date jump rows; full > command mode (catalog + ranking read live from the native palette); Shift+Enter opens in other panel. Native palette stays on Cmd+Shift+P. Rebind via custom.jumpShortcut / custom.commandShortcut below (Mod = Cmd on macOS, Ctrl elsewhere; e.g. "Mod+Shift+K").
